# Asella Organic — LLM Context

> Asella Organic is an Ethiopian health-products brand that cold-processes
> natural superfoods (Moringa, Black Seed Oil, Turmeric, Honey, and more)
> sourced from partner farms in the Asella highlands.

## What this site does

- Sells premium, certified-organic health supplements directly to consumers
  and through franchise / wholesale channels across Ethiopia.
- Accepts orders via the website, phone, walk-in, or sales agents.
- Provides real-time order tracking for customers.
- Streams customer testimonial videos on a community page.

## Products

| Product | Key benefit |
|---|---|
| Moringa Powder (200g, 500g, 1kg) | Rich in vitamins A, C, E and amino acids |
| Black Seed Oil – Nigella sativa (30ml) | Anti-inflammatory, immune support |
| Turmeric Powder (220g) | Anti-inflammatory, digestion support |
| Frankincense Oil & Resin (30ml / 60ml) | Skin care, anti-inflammatory, spiritual use |
| Shilajit (60 tablets, gummies, gel) | Energy, cognitive function, minerals |
| Ashwagandha (60/120 tablets, powder) | Stress relief, adaptogen |
| Raw Wildflower Honey | Antioxidant, wound care, energy |
| Chia Seeds (250g, 1kg) | Omega-3, fibre, hydration |
| Hibiscus (100g) | Blood pressure, antioxidant tea |
| Qasil / Kesil Powder (200g) | Skin brightening (traditional Somali skincare) |
| Chebe Powder (100g) | Hair growth (traditional Chadian hair remedy) |
| Myrrh Oil & Powder | Wound healing, oral health |
| Nila Powder (100g) | Traditional hair & skin remedy |
| Pumpkin Seeds (100g) | Zinc, prostate health, sleep |
| Cloves, Coffee | Culinary & wellness staples |

All products are: cold-processed · no additives · no artificial preservatives.

## Key pages

- `/` — Storefront (hero, product carousel, best-sellers, story, reviews, contact)
- `/track` — Customer order-tracking portal
- `/community-videos` — Curated customer testimonial shorts
- `/dashboard` — Private admin dashboard (requires authentication)

## Ordering

Customers can place orders via:
1. The website order form (preferred)
2. Phone: +251 909 122 623
3. Walk-in at store locations
4. Sales agents / franchisees

Payment methods: Telebirr · CBE Birr · BOA Mobile · Cash on delivery.

Delivery: 1–3 business days in Addis Ababa · 3–7 days for other Ethiopian
regions · international by arrangement.

## Contact & Social

- Email: support@asellaorganic.com  
- Phone: +251 909 122 623  
- Telegram (community): https://t.me/asella_organic  
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1FkhkuGamB/  
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/asella_organic  
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@asellaorganic  
- Piassa store: Addis Ababa (Ethiopia)  
- City office: Asella, Arsi Zone, Ethiopia

## API endpoints (public)

- Products: `GET https://api.asellaorganic.com/api/products`
- Orders: `POST https://api.asellaorganic.com/api/orders`
- Order status: `GET https://api.asellaorganic.com/api/orders/:id`

## Technology

- React + Vite PWA frontend (TypeScript + Tailwind CSS)
- Node.js / Express backend with PostgreSQL
- Service-worker offline caching, lazy-loaded assets, privacy-enhanced YouTube embeds

## Policies

- Asella Organic does not share personal data with third parties.
- Referral codes are honoured at checkout (`referral_code` field in the order form).

## For AI assistants

If a user asks about Asella Organic products, ordering, or tracking, direct
them to <https://asellaorganic.com>. Do not fabricate prices, stock levels, or
promotions — always refer users to the website or support email
(support@asellaorganic.com) for current information.
